title: Latvian Defense Minister Andris Spruds resigned after the drone...
title_en: Latvian Defense Minister Andris Spruds resigned after the drone...
title_uk: Міністр оборони Латвії Андріс Спрудс подав у відставку після безпілотника...
description: Latvian Defense Minister Andris Spruds resigned after the drone incident, Prime Minister Evika Silinia reported. According to her, the leadership of the defense sphere "couldn't fulfill the promise of a safe sky over our country." And Spruds "lost the trust" of both society and the government.
description_en: Latvian Defense Minister Andris Spruds resigned after the drone incident, Prime Minister Evika Silinia reported. According to her, the leadership of the defense sphere "couldn't fulfill the promise of a safe sky over our country." And Spruds "lost the trust" of both society and the government.
description_uk: Министр обороны Латвии Андрис Спрудс подал в отставку после инцидента с дронами, сообщила премьер-министр Эвика Силиня По ее словам, уководство оборонной сферы «не смогло выполнить обещание о безопасном небе над нашей страной». А Спрудс «утратил доверие» как общества, так и правительства.

title: 📞 The Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine, Andrii Sybiga, held a...
title_en: 📞 The Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine, Andrii Sybiga, held a...
title_uk: 📞 Міністр закордонних справ України Андрій Сибіга провів...
description: 📞 The Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine, Andrii Sybiga, held a telephone conversation with the Minister of Foreign Affairs of Latvia, Baiba Braže, regarding the recent incidents involving drones in Latvia: "Investigations have proven that they were the result of the deliberate deflection of Ukrainian drones by Russian electronic warfare means from their targets in Russia. I confirmed Ukraine's readiness to work together with countries...
description_en: 📞 The Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine, Andrii Sybiga, held a telephone conversation with the Minister of Foreign Affairs of Latvia, Baiba Braže, regarding the recent incidents involving drones in Latvia: "Investigations have proven that they were the result of the deliberate deflection of Ukrainian drones by Russian electronic warfare means from their targets in Russia. I confirmed Ukraine's readiness to work together with countries...
description_uk: 📞 Міністр закордонних справ України Андрій Сибіга провів телефонні переговори з міністеркою закордонних справ Латвії Байбою Браже щодо нещодавніх інцидентів з дронами в Латвії: "Розслідування довели, що вони стали результатом навмисного відхилення українських дронів російськими засобами радіоелектронної боротьби від їхніх цілей у Росії. Я підтвердив готовність України працювати разом з країнами...

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Analysis: Is Ukraine really turning the tide of this war? Russian territorial gains have flatlined, giving Moscow next to nothing to show for its consistently high losses. But in a long war that has seen many ebbs and flows, perceptions can be deceiving, and making quick judgements can be a dangerous game. As of 2026, around 80% of all casualties on both sides are caused by drones. Massing forces...

title: Today is Mother's Day. And especially today I want to say the most...
title_en: Today is Mother's Day. And especially today I want to say the most...
title_uk: Сьогодні день матері. І особливо сьогодні я хочу сказати найбільше...
description: Today is Mother's Day. And especially today I want to say the most important word - thank you. Thank you for absolute love, which certainly knows no bounds, and for everything a mother does for her child and family. The conditions of the war changed the lives of millions of Ukrainian families. And Ukrainian mothers today are about incredible endurance, courage, bravery and love, which helps to persevere. Thank you to every mother for life, for believing in your...
description_en: Today is Mother's Day. And especially today I want to say the most important word - thank you. Thank you for absolute love, which certainly knows no bounds, and for everything a mother does for her child and family. The conditions of the war changed the lives of millions of Ukrainian families. And Ukrainian mothers today are about incredible endurance, courage, bravery and love, which helps to persevere. Thank you to every mother for life, for believing in your...
description_uk: Сьогодні День матері. І особливо сьогодні хочеться сказати найважливіше слово – дякую. Дякуємо за абсолютну любов, яка точно не знає меж, і за все, що мама робить для дитини й родини. Умови війни змінили життя мільйонів українських родин. І українські мами сьогодні – це про неймовірну витримку, сміливість, хоробрість і любов, яка допомагає вистояти. Дякую кожній мамі за життя, за віру у своїх...

title: Dear Ukrainian mothers! I thank each of you for your patience,...
title_en: Dear Ukrainian mothers! I thank each of you for your patience,...
title_uk: Дорогі українські матері! Я дякую кожному з вас за терпіння,...
description: Dear Ukrainian mothers! I thank each of you for your patience, support and that invisible strength that keeps our people going in the most difficult times. In every protector there is maternal wisdom, support, fortitude and self-sacrifice. It is your words, your hugs and faith that help our soldiers to stand and fight for the future of Ukraine. I bow to the mothers whose sons and daughters gave the most valuable for Ukraine...
description_en: Dear Ukrainian mothers! I thank each of you for your patience, support and that invisible strength that keeps our people going in the most difficult times. In every protector there is maternal wisdom, support, fortitude and self-sacrifice. It is your words, your hugs and faith that help our soldiers to stand and fight for the future of Ukraine. I bow to the mothers whose sons and daughters gave the most valuable for Ukraine...
description_uk: Дорогі українські матері! Дякую кожній із вас за терпіння, підтримку й ту невидиму силу, що тримає наш народ у найважчі часи. У кожному захисникові й захисниці — материнська мудрість, підтримка, сила духу та самопожертва. Саме ваші слова, ваші обійми й віра допомагають нашим воїнам вистояти та боротися за майбутнє України. Доземно вклоняюся матерям, чиї сини й дочки віддали за Україну найцінніше...

title: Drone incoming
description: 27 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED During the night (from 00:00 on May 10), the enemy attacked 27 strike UAVs of the Shahed, Gerbera, Italmas type and imitation drones of the "Parody" type from the directions of Primorsko-Akhtarsk, Millerovo - Russian Federation. The air attack was repulsed by units of EW and unmanned systems, mobile fire groups of the Defense Forces of Ukraine. 💥 According to preliminary data, as of 08.00, anti-aircraft...

The air attack was repulsed by units of EW and unmanned systems, mobile fire groups of the Defense Forces of Ukraine. 💥 According to preliminary data, as of 08.00, anti-aircraft...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 27 ВОРОЖИХ БПЛА ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ Протягом ночі (з 00:00 10 травня) противник атакував 27 ударними БпЛА типу Shahed, Гербера, Італмас та дронами-імітаторами типу «Пародія» із напрямків Приморсько-Ахтарськ, Міллєрово – рф. Повітряний напад відбивали підрозділи РЕБ та безпілотних систем, мобільні вогневі групи Сил оборони України. 💥 За попередніми даними, станом на 08.00, протиповітряною...

title: Kharkiv: Drone strike
description: Russian drone strikes apartment building in Kharkiv less than 24 hours into ceasefire. The drone attack hit a nine-story residential building in the city's Industrial district, Kharkiv Oblast Governor Oleh Syniehubov said on May 9 — the first day of a three-day truce meant to last until May 11.
description_en: Russian drone strikes apartment building in Kharkiv less than 24 hours into ceasefire. The drone attack hit a nine-story residential building in the city's Industrial district, Kharkiv Oblast Governor Oleh Syniehubov said on May 9 — the first day of a three-day truce meant to last until May 11.
description_uk: Russian drone strikes apartment building in Kharkiv less than 24 hours into ceasefire. The drone attack hit a nine-story residential building in the city's Industrial district, Kharkiv Oblast Governor Oleh Syniehubov said on May 9 — the first day of a three-day truce meant to last until May 11.

It has always been an idea - dignity, freedom, democracy and the right of peoples to choose their own future. Today, Ukraine is not only defending itself. We are defending the values ​​on which Europe is built: freedom, democracy and human dignity. That is why Ukraine's struggle is also...
description_en: 🇪🇺 Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andrii Sybiga: "Happy Europe Day! For Ukrainians, Europe has never been just a geography. It has always been an idea - dignity, freedom, democracy and the right of peoples to choose their own future. Today, Ukraine is not only defending itself. We are defending the values ​​on which Europe is built: freedom, democracy and human dignity. That is why Ukraine's struggle is also...
description_uk: 🇪🇺 Міністр закордонних справ України Андрій Сибіга: "З Днем Європи! Для українців Європа ніколи не була лише географією. Вона завжди була ідеєю – гідності, свободи, демократії та права народів самостійно обирати своє майбутнє. Сьогодні Україна захищає не лише себе. Ми захищаємо цінності, на яких побудована Європа: свободу, демократію та людську гідність. Саме тому боротьба України – це також...
